Giemsa stain code → fill color

Source: R/seq_ideogram.R
dot-ideogram_fill_colors.Rd

Maps UCSC gieStain codes (gneg, gpos25..gpos100, acen, stalk, gvar) to fill colors. Unknown codes fall through to "#CCCCCC".

Usage

.ideogram_fill_colors(stain)

Arguments

stain

Character vector of gieStain codes.

Value

Character vector of fill colors, same length as stain.
